provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly interior scene, muted dusty palette, visible brushstrokes, atmospheric sci-fi corridor or room interior, no characters present, strong mood through lighting, customs checkpoint hall with overhead fluorescent banks creating flat institutional lighting, queue barriers casting long shadows, scanning arches lit from within, steel blue walls look cold under fluorescent, waiting area feels like a government office at closing time
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, anime, cartoon, people, characters, figures, bright cheerful, luxury, text, watermark, blurry, low quality

judgment.explanation: Lighting/mood study with strong atmospheric character appropriate to gritty space.

assertions.rationale: Lighting reads correctly — warm upper-left with soft shadows
Palette is muted and dusty — no bright saturated colors
Full body, front-facing, plain background, correct fill
Colors muted and lived-in — no neon or bright saturated tones
Partially meets not generic sci-fi (no spandex/star trek/marvel/asset store) (65%)

canon_assertions.rationale: Lighting reads correctly — warm upper-left with soft shadows
Palette is muted and dusty — no bright saturated colors
Full body, front-facing, plain background, correct fill
Colors muted and lived-in — no neon or bright saturated tones

canon_explanation: Approved: passes 6/7 constitution rules.  Lighting/mood study with strong atmospheric character appropriate to gritty space.
